ns0:entry.ns0:title: BytePioneer-AI/openclaw-china
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BytePioneer-AI/openclaw-china
Language: typescript
OpenClaw中国插件：支持飞书，钉钉，QQ，企业微信，微信

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Fission-AI/OpenSpec
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Fission-AI/OpenSpec
Language: typescript
Spec-driven development (SDD) for AI coding assistants.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FlorianBruniaux/claude-code-ultimate-guide
Language: typescript
A tremendous feat of documentation, this guide covers Claude Code from beginner to power user, with production-ready templates for Claude Code features, guides on agentic workflows, and a lot of great learning materials, including quizzes and a handy "cheatsheet". Whether it's the "ultimate" guide to Claude Code will be up to the reader :)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ItzCrazyKns/Vane
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ItzCrazyKns/Vane
Language: typescript
Vane is an AI-powered answering engine.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhi1693/openclaw-mission-control
Language: typescript
AI Agent Orchestration Dashboard - Manage AI agents, assign tasks, and coordinate multi-agent collaboration via OpenClaw Gateway.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus
Language: typescript
GitNexus: The Zero-Server Code Intelligence Engine - GitNexus is a client-side knowledge graph creator that runs entirely in your browser. Drop in a GitHub repo or ZIP file, and get an interactive knowledge graph wit a built in Graph RAG Agent. Perfect for code exploration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: koala73/worldmonitor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/koala73/worldmonitor
Language: typescript
Real-time global intelligence dashboard. AI-powered news aggregation, geopolitical monitoring, and infrastructure tracking in a unified situational awareness interface

ns0:entry.ns0:title: moeru-ai/airi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/moeru-ai/airi
Language: typescript
💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's altitude. Capable of realtime voice chat, Minecraft, Factorio playing. Web / macOS / Windows supported.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: promptfoo/promptfoo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/promptfoo/promptfoo
Language: typescript
Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration. Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/ruflo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/ruflo
Language: typescript
🌊 The leading agent orchestration platform for Claude. Deploy intelligent multi-agent swarms, coordinate autonomous workflows, and build conversational AI systems. Features enterprise-grade architecture, distributed swarm intelligence, RAG integration, and native Claude Code / Codex Integration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shadcn-ui/ui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadcn-ui/ui
Language: typescript
A set of beautifully-designed, accessible components and a code distribution platform. Works with your favorite frameworks. Open Source. Open Code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
Language: typescript
Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

ns0:entry.ns0:title: supermemoryai/supermemory
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/supermemoryai/supermemory
Language: typescript
Memory engine and app that is extremely fast, scalable. The Memory API for the AI era.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: superset-sh/superset
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/superset-sh/superset
Language: typescript
Code Editor for the AI Agents Era - Run an army of Claude Code, Codex, etc. on your machine
